{{Quote|ST-Two-Nine-Seven. I apologize if I’m intruding on a classified conversation.|ST-297|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''ST-297''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who held the rank of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and was part of the ambush squad for [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during their [[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|quest]] to retrieve moss painting ''[[Killik Twilight]]'' on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="TG" /> 

ST-297 offered his [[Electrobinoculars/Legends|electrobinoculars]] to Leia, who was in disguise as a stormtrooper, after he noticed that she dropped hers accidentally. When she mistakenly addressed him as a [[Captain/Legends|captain]], ST-297 became suspicious and asked her their service numbers but was quickly placated by Han. Later on the pair would learn that the electrobinoculars that ST-297 lent them contained an eavesdropping bug that blew their cover.<ref name="TG" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{1st}}
